# Sigtake

> Real-time alert management & monitoring for ops teams. Sigtake ingests alerts
> from all your systems, collapses duplicates into one row, and routes what
> matters to the right team — by email, SMS, Microsoft Teams or in-app. Uptime
> and signal monitoring included.

## Product
- [Features](https://sigtake.com/#features): alert deduplication, routing, multi-tenant workspaces
- [Monitoring](https://sigtake.com/#monitoring): uptime and signal monitoring built in
- [Pricing](https://sigtake.com/#pricing): free during early access; paid plans as we grow

## Signals & monitoring
- Push numeric metrics via API (`POST /api/signals/ingest`); rules evaluate every minute.
- Rule types: threshold (avg/min/max/last over a window), anomaly detection
  (learns normal by hour & weekday, no threshold), and heartbeat (alerts when a metric stops).
- Signal alerts flow into the same dedup, routing and notification pipeline.
- Website/uptime monitoring: periodic checks with uptime % and latency trends.
